title: [ImportVerilog][Bug] Fix single argument expressions in severity tasks

features.name: single expression argument in display tasks
features.description: Code should include display tasks with single non-literal expression arguments like $displayb(variable), $displayo(variable), $displayh(variable)

features.name: sformatf result as severity task argument
features.description: Code should include severity tasks with $sformatf expression as an argument

features.name: non-literal first argument in display tasks
features.description: Code should include display tasks with non-string-literal expressions as the first argument

features.name: severity system tasks with expression arguments
features.description: Code should include severity system tasks like $fatal, $error, $warning, $info with expression arguments instead of format strings
